aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Mountain Pro HVAC Services due to limited structured data and insufficient conversational content. They need to enhance their online presence for AI to recognize and recommend them effectively.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business information.
Expand content to include more conversational FAQs and How-To guides.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP. This inconsistency may confuse AI and reduce trust.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website footer.
Ensure all online directories reflect the same NAP information as GBP.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Aurora, Colorado, where AI may prioritize more AI-optimized competitors.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning Adrian Vargas as an HVAC expert through media features and detailed service guides.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top HVAC authority in Aurora.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to secure your position as the go-to HVAC provider.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven HVAC Leads in Aurora Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business the top choice for AI-driven HVAC searches.
page_title: Heating And Ac Repair | Mountain Pro HVAC Services | United States
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
